top_signals.title: Iran Moves to Tap Key Asian Markets as U.S. Waives Oil Sanctions
top_signals.summary: Iran is pitching its oil to Asian buyers outside China, contacting India, South Korea, and Japan, as the United States issued a temporary two-month waiver allowing Iranian oil sales, including in U.S. dollars, until August 21. As part of the 14-point memorandum of understanding with Iran, the United States on Sunday authorized the production, delivery, and sale of crude oil, petrochemical products, and refined oil products of Iranian origin through August 21, 2026. Representatives of the National Iranian Oil Company (NIOC) and other sellers have…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Powell, Acceptance Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech For the 2026 John F. Kennedy Profile in Courage Award, John F. Kennedy Library Foundation, Boston, Massachusetts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin gets new $54K warning as BTC price hits 11-day low on Asia tech sell-off
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin analysis warned of "new lows" as Asia markets dropped up to 10% and BTC price action dipped below $62,000 for the first time in nearly two weeks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board announces that results from its annual bank stress test will be released on Wednesday, June 24, at 4 p.m. EDT.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board announces that results from its annual bank stress test will be released on Wednesday, June 24, at 4 p.m. EDT.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Oracle sheds 21,000 roles over the past year amid wave of AI layoffs from tech giants
top_signals.summary: "The adoption and deployment of AI technologies across our operations have resulted, and may continue to result, in reductions to our workforce," Oracle said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Digital Euro Clears Key Hurdle to Rollout in EU Parliament
top_signals.summary: European Union lawmakers cleared the way for talks on the legal framework that will underpin the digital euro, a project deemed vital to the bloc’s monetary independence.

top_signals.title: China's nuclear power capacity nearly doubled since 2016
top_signals.summary: From 2016 to 2024, China's nuclear generation capacity increased 76% (24 GW), based on our International Energy Statistics (IES) data. According to the International Atomic Energy Agency's Power Reactor Information System (PRIS), China added an additional 1.1 GW of nuclear power capacity in 2025 and 2.2 GW in 2026 (through May). China is continuing to build out its nuclear generating capacity and has 36 reactors under construction, accounting for more than 49% of total world nuclear construction, according to PRIS.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Highway patrol: US Marine F-35s conduct flight operations on Finnish roads
top_signals.summary: The first ever deployment of U.S. Marine Corps F-35B Lightning IIs to Finland proved to be a memorable one.

top_signals.title: Ripple targets EU, wins preliminary MiCA approval from Luxembourg financial regulator
U.S. natural gas storage capacity increased slightly in 2025
top_signals.summary: Underground working natural gas storage capacity in the Lower 48 states increased slightly in 2025, according to our latest data, with growth concentrated in the South Central and Mountain regions. Underground natural gas storage provides a source of energy when demand increases, balancing U.S. energy needs. We calculate natural gas storage capacity in two ways: demonstrated peak capacity and working gas design capacity. Both increased in 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
